brands.name: Kohler India

profiles.title: KOHLER India | LinkedIn
profiles.description:
KOHLER India | 80,952 followers on LinkedIn. The Bold Look of Kohler | KOHLER® was founded in 1873 and is headquartered in Kohler, Wisconsin, USA. Kohler Co. is one of America’s oldest and largest privately held companies.

KOHLER INDIA
Kohler has been shaping the design and innovation landscape in India since 2005, with a strong presence across the following business and service lines:

• Kitchen & Bath – A wholly owned subsidiary of Kohler Co., USA, this division was established in 2005 with its headquarters in Gurgaon.
